name: Billie,s Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crispy, then remove it from the grease and set aside.
2. In a large skillet or pot, fry the sliced potatoes in the remaining grease until they are nearly done.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and continue frying until all ingredients are cooked through.
4. Add the rest of the ingredients (excluding the bacon) to the skillet and cook until bubbles form on top.
5. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon before serving.
